description_long: This is a digital keyboard piano mounted on a red, X-shaped metal stand, positioned on a dark wooden platform. The keyboard features a full set of black and white keys, with the brand 'studiologic' clearly visible on the front panel. The casing of the keyboard is primarily black with orange accents on the sides, and the stand is constructed from tubular metal with rubberized feet for stability. The piano lacks visible pedals and does not have a music stand attached. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for street performances or urban music events. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for easy transport and setup in various urban environments.
description: A black digital keyboard piano with orange accents, mounted on a red X-frame metal stand atop a dark wooden platform. The 'studiologic' brand is visible, and the setup is compact and portable.
description_view_0: The keyboard is seen from an angle showing the full set of keys and the red X-stand, with the wooden platform clearly visible beneath.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the 'studiologic' branding on the front panel and the orange end caps, with the X-stand and platform in profile.
description_view_2: The keyboard is viewed from the opposite side, showing the orange accent on the left and the angled X-stand, with less detail on the keys.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the keyboard, displaying the full width of the keys and the symmetrical X-stand, with the wooden platform beneath.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard piano keyboard layout with alternating white and black keys, approximately 61 keys in total, no split or missing keys.
